name: Ingrid Neumann
title: Rechnungsprüferin / Prüferin der Vergabestelle
organization_type: State audit institution for municipal procurement

daily_reality.typical_day: Audits completed Vergabeverfahren from municipalities. Reviews Vergabevermerk, Bewertungsmatrix, Zuschlagsentscheidung for legal compliance. Checks if scoring matches published criteria. Flags inconsistencies. Writes audit reports (Prüfungsmitteilungen).
daily_reality.biggest_time_waste: Reconstructing the evaluation logic from incomplete Excel files. Municipalities use different formats. Missing Begründungen. Inconsistent scoring that nobody can explain 6 months later.
daily_reality.weekly_volume: Audits 1-2 complete Vergabeverfahren per week (each takes 2-3 days)
critical_constraints: Must verify all evaluator scores are documented
Must verify Zuschlagsentscheidung follows from scores

psychology.tech_savviness: low — prefers paper, uses digital tools only when mandated
psychology.risk_tolerance: zero — her findings can void contract awards
frustration_triggers: AI-generated scores without documented human review
can't trace who scored what and when
data that can be retroactively changed
delight_triggers: complete audit log with timestamps and user IDs
auto-generated Vergabevermerk with all required sections

first_screen: Not a regular user — accesses as auditor/read-only. Expects a 'Prüfungsansicht' (audit view) of a completed Verfahren.
must_have: Complete, immutable audit trail (who, what, when)
Version history of all scoring changes
No ability to modify past evaluations
deal_breakers: Scoring records can be changed after submission
AI made scoring decisions without human sign-off
nice_to_have: Automated compliance check against VgV/VOB requirements
Compare evaluation against statistical norms (unusual scoring patterns)
expectations.current_pain_level: 8/10 — municipalities' inconsistent Excel files make every audit a detective story
